author: codex
scope: Applied deterministic spreadsheet preview sidecars for 10 not-ready spreadsheet sources after a clean wave50 generated-output checkpoint, refreshed readiness, and started the reopened ready pool as detached wave51.
mutation_mechanism: bun packages/cli/src/cli.ts source-prep-apply-preview <source_id> --run-id spreadsheet-backlog-20260623; writes raw/sources/<source_id>/text.txt and blocks.jsonl from reviewed data/source-prep sidecars

verification.repo_secret_scan_after_launch: rg for Pioneer key fragments returned no matches

readiness_after_apply.interpretation: The reopened 10-source pool came from batch025 and was launched as wave51.

ingest_started.command_template: PIONEER_API_KEY='<PIONEER_API_KEY>' MTA_MATERIALIZE_EVERY=100000 setsid -f bun packages/cli/src/cli.ts campaign ingest --wave 51 --id validation-2026-06 --size 10 --concurrency 10 --timeout-min 300 --profile pioneer-deepseek-flash
